assertions.assertion: Creates a ClaimsPrincipal with a ClaimsIdentity containing a birthdate claim
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 6 shows new ClaimsPrincipal(new ClaimsIdentity([new Claim(JwtClaimTypes.BirthDate, '1990-01-01')]))

assertions.assertion: Constructs an AuthorizationHandlerContext with the requirement, user principal, and resource
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 6 shows new AuthorizationHandlerContext([requirement], user, resource: null)

assertions.assertion: Calls HandleAsync on the handler directly
Asserts context.HasSucceeded is true for a user meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 6 shows Assert.True(context.HasSucceeded) for sufficient age

assertions.assertion: Asserts context.HasSucceeded is false for a user not meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 6 shows Assert.False(context.HasSucceeded) for insufficient age
